summary: Frontend-only responsive testing of /admin/outreach Medalists and Category Explorer views on desktop (1920x900) and mobile (390x844). All responsive layout changes verified working. Page-level overflow is clean on both viewports; tables scroll internally via their overflow-x-auto wrapper as intended.

desktop_1920x900.stats_visible: PASS - shows '156 searched / 125 w/ handles / 6 high-conf.'
desktop_1920x900.medalists_view: PASS - Gold/Silver medal rows rendered; 'Tweet · N' compact badges, @handle pills, Like and Draft Quote buttons on one row; NO duplicated tweet preview text
desktop_1920x900.category_explorer_controls: PASS - period/find button on one row

mobile_390x844.page_overflow: PASS - scrollWidth=390 == clientWidth=390 (NO horizontal body scroll) across Medalists view, Category Explorer view, and after period switch
mobile_390x844.header_stats_activity_wrap: PASS - title top, stats + Activity link wrap to next row (Activity at x=277, y=139.5)
mobile_390x844.medalists_tweet_badges: PASS - 'Tweet · N' badges detected in DOM
mobile_390x844.category_explorer_controls_wrap: PASS - period buttons / archive dropdown / Find button wrap cleanly

notes: Unrelated CSP warnings present for external scripts (gtag, cloudflare beacon, posthog worker blob). Pre-existing, not caused by this change.
Bronze medal data not present in the currently loaded Weekly dataset (Week 16, 2026 — 3 cats, 5 papers showed Gold and Silver only). This is data-dependent, not a UI bug.
Attempted Monthly -> March 2026 switch; the archive select was available. Overflow check stayed clean at 390px.
critical_code_review_comments: OutreachPage.jsx is 1090 lines — consider splitting MedalistsView, CategoryExplorer, MedalistRow, PaperRow, and XAuthCard into separate files for maintainability (>700 line guideline).
Some medalist rows show dash '—' for score — cosmetic only.
Password stored in localStorage/sessionStorage as admin_token (hardcoded string compare on frontend) — acceptable for internal admin but flagged for awareness.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Responsive layout of /admin/outreach is verified on desktop and mobile. No page-level horizontal overflow on 390px viewport. Tables have intentional min-w-[640px]/[720px] inside overflow-x-auto wrappers — that is scoped horizontal scroll within the table only. Activity link -> /admin/outreach/activity works.
